label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the limited liability company is
rationale: LLC name; must contain 'limited liability company' or an approved abbreviation per 31 MRSA §1508.
Specific later effective date (only when entity.formation_effective_date_choice = 'later_specified').

label_verbatim: THIRD: [ ] This is a low-profit limited liability company pursuant to 31 MRSA §1611
rationale: Boolean elect-in for L3C status (with attestation to qualifications A-D).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: [ ] This is a professional limited liability company* formed pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A

rationale: Free-text professional services list (only when entity.is_professional_llc = true).
Maine SOS Commercial Registered Agent public registration number; required only when registered_agent.type = 'commercial'.
Name line for commercial registered agent (single canonical key shared with noncommercial path).
Name line for noncommercial registered agent (alternate path; same canonical key).

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box - street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line physical address (street, city, state, zip combined).
Page-null residual checkbox; the form template appears to have replaced this with the named 'IMM' widget. Likely orphaned and ignored at fill time.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: ...set forth in the attached Exhibit ___, and made part hereof
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for the optional initial statement of authority (per 31 MRSA §1542.1).

label_verbatim: **By ___ (original written signature of authorized person) / (type or print name and title of signer)
rationale: Printed name and title of authorized signer.
